title: IJIAMY Bento Lunch Box Kids, Bento Box Lunch Box Adults with 5 Compartments and 1 Salad Dressing Containers, Snack Box for Kids and Adults Work School
features: ✔ Safe Food Grade Material - The IJIAMY lunch box with compartments is made of food grade PP material, BPA free and non-toxic. Healthy for children and adults.
✔ Leak-proof Bento Lunch box for Kids and Adults – the entire lunch box is leak-proof. The lunch box adults has a lid with four-point closure that closes the lid tightly.
✔Kids Lunch Box with Compartments – The lunchbox has 5 compartments to serve main food, fruit, snacks, salad, sandwich and sauce separately.

✔ Microwave and Dishwasher Safe Bento Box Lunch Box Adults - Suitable for use at -20°C to 110°C. Ideal for use in the microwave, fridge and dishwasher (please remove the lid before the microwave) microwave safe temperature 2-4 minutes below 248°C.

✔ Outdoor and Easy to Carry - Kids Lunch Box with Compartments with divided lunch box design is easy to carry lunch food and salad when at school, office, picnic and travel. A great gift for your family and friends
description: Kids Lunch Box, Bento Box for Kids and Adults with 5 Compartments
